# Measurely

> Free online calculators, unit converters, and helpful guides for finance, health, math, engineering, and everyday life.

## Website
- Home: https://measurely.in/
- Blog: https://measurely.in/blog
- Calculators: https://measurely.in/calculators
- Converters: https://measurely.in/converters
- Categories: https://measurely.in/categories
- Search: https://measurely.in/search
- About: https://measurely.in/about
- Contact: https://measurely.in/contact

## Calculators — Finance
- [EMI Calculator](https://measurely.in/emi-calculator): Calculate loan EMI, total interest, and payment schedule
- [Loan Calculator](https://measurely.in/loan-calculator): Estimate monthly loan payments and total interest
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://measurely.in/mortgage-calculator): Compare mortgage rates and monthly payments
- [Interest Calculator](https://measurely.in/interest-calculator): Compute simple and compound interest
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://measurely.in/compound-interest-calculator): Calculate compound interest growth over time
- [SIP Calculator](https://measurely.in/sip-calculator): Plan systematic investment plan returns
- [SWP Calculator](https://measurely.in/swp-calculator): Calculate systematic withdrawal plan income
- [FD Calculator](https://measurely.in/fd-calculator): Estimate fixed deposit maturity amount
- [RD Calculator](https://measurely.in/rd-calculator): Calculate recurring deposit returns
- [GST Calculator](https://measurely.in/gst-calculator): Compute GST amounts for goods and services
- [Tax Calculator](https://measurely.in/tax-calculator): Estimate income tax liability
- [Salary Calculator](https://measurely.in/salary-calculator): Calculate take-home salary and deductions
- [Paycheck Calculator](https://measurely.in/paycheck-calculator): Estimate net pay after taxes and deductions
- [ROI Calculator](https://measurely.in/roi-calculator): Calculate return on investment
- [Freelance Rate Calculator](https://measurely.in/freelance-rate-calculator): Determine optimal freelance hourly rates

## Calculators — Real Estate
- [Home Affordability Calculator](https://measurely.in/home-affordability-calculator): Determine how much house you can afford
- [Rent vs Buy Calculator](https://measurely.in/rent-vs-buy-calculator): Compare renting versus buying a home

## Calculators — Retirement
- [401(k) Retirement Calculator](https://measurely.in/401k-retirement-calculator): Project 401(k) savings growth for retirement

## Calculators — Health
- [BMI Calculator](https://measurely.in/bmi-calculator): Calculate body mass index
- [BMR Calculator](https://measurely.in/bmr-calculator): Calculate basal metabolic rate
- [Body Fat Calculator](https://measurely.in/body-fat-calculator): Estimate body fat percentage
- [Calorie Calculator](https://measurely.in/calorie-calculator): Calculate daily calorie needs
- [Water Intake Calculator](https://measurely.in/water-intake-calculator): Determine daily water intake needs
- [Pregnancy Calculator](https://measurely.in/pregnancy-calculator): Estimate due date and pregnancy milestones
- [Heart Rate Calculator](https://measurely.in/heart-rate-calculator): Calculate target heart rate zones
- [Ideal Weight Calculator](https://measurely.in/ideal-weight-calculator): Estimate ideal body weight

## Calculators — Math
- [Percentage Calculator](https://measurely.in/percentage-calculator): Calculate percentages and ratios
- [Fraction Calculator](https://measurely.in/fraction-calculator): Perform fraction arithmetic
- [Scientific Calculator](https://measurely.in/scientific-calculator): Advanced scientific calculations
- [Matrix Calculator](https://measurely.in/matrix-calculator): Perform matrix operations
- [Equation Solver](https://measurely.in/equation-solver): Solve algebraic equations
- [GCF & LCM Calculator](https://measurely.in/gcf-lcm-calculator): Find greatest common factor and least common multiple
- [Prime Number Calculator](https://measurely.in/prime-number-calculator): Check prime numbers and generate primes
- [Statistics Calculator](https://measurely.in/statistics-calculator): Calculate statistical measures

## Calculators — Engineering
- [Ohms Law Calculator](https://measurely.in/ohms-law-calculator): Calculate voltage, current, resistance, and power
- [Voltage Divider Calculator](https://measurely.in/voltage-divider-calculator): Calculate voltage divider circuit values
- [Power Calculator](https://measurely.in/power-calculator): Calculate electrical power consumption
- [Resistor Calculator](https://measurely.in/resistor-calculator): Determine resistor values from color codes
- [Watt Calculator](https://measurely.in/watt-calculator): Convert between watts, volts, amps, and ohms

## Calculators — Construction
- [Concrete Calculator](https://measurely.in/concrete-calculator): Estimate concrete volume needed
- [Paint Calculator](https://measurely.in/paint-calculator): Calculate paint required for rooms
- [Tile Calculator](https://measurely.in/tile-calculator): Estimate tiles needed for flooring
- [Roofing Calculator](https://measurely.in/roofing-calculator): Calculate roofing materials needed
- [Flooring Calculator](https://measurely.in/flooring-calculator): Estimate flooring material requirements

## Calculators — Daily Life
- [Discount Calculator](https://measurely.in/discount-calculator): Calculate sale prices and savings
- [Tip Calculator](https://measurely.in/tip-calculator): Calculate restaurant tips and split bills
- [Split Bill Calculator](https://measurely.in/split-bill-calculator): Divide expenses evenly among groups
- [Fuel Cost Calculator](https://measurely.in/fuel-cost-calculator): Estimate fuel costs for trips
- [Age Calculator](https://measurely.in/age-calculator): Calculate exact age in years, months, and days
- [Date Calculator](https://measurely.in/date-calculator): Add or subtract days from dates
- [Days Between Dates](https://measurely.in/days-between-dates): Calculate days between two dates
- [Time Duration Calculator](https://measurely.in/time-duration-calculator): Calculate time between two timestamps
- [Week Calculator](https://measurely.in/week-calculator): Calculate weeks between dates
- [Month Calculator](https://measurely.in/month-calculator): Calculate months between dates

## Calculators — Education
- [GPA Calculator](https://measurely.in/gpa-calculator): Calculate grade point average
- [CGPA Calculator](https://measurely.in/cgpa-calculator): Calculate cumulative grade point average
- [Grade Calculator](https://measurely.in/grade-calculator): Calculate final grades and scores
- [Marks Percentage Calculator](https://measurely.in/marks-percentage-calculator): Calculate exam percentage scores

## Calculators — Automotive
- [EV Charging Cost Calculator](https://measurely.in/ev-charging-cost-calculator): Calculate electric vehicle charging costs

## Calculators — Social Media
- [YouTube Money Calculator](https://measurely.in/youtube-money-calculator): Estimate YouTube earnings from views

## Converters
- [Currency Converter](https://measurely.in/currency-converter): Convert between world currencies
- [Length Converter](https://measurely.in/length-converter): Convert between length and distance units
- [Weight Converter](https://measurely.in/weight-converter): Convert between weight and mass units
- [Area Converter](https://measurely.in/area-converter): Convert between area measurement units
- [Volume Converter](https://measurely.in/volume-converter): Convert between volume and capacity units
- [Speed Converter](https://measurely.in/speed-converter): Convert between speed and velocity units
- [Temperature Converter](https://measurely.in/temperature-converter): Convert between temperature scales
- [Pressure Converter](https://measurely.in/pressure-converter): Convert between pressure units
- [Energy Converter](https://measurely.in/energy-converter): Convert between energy and work units
- [Time Converter](https://measurely.in/time-converter): Convert between time units
- [Data Storage Converter](https://measurely.in/data-storage-converter): Convert between data storage units
- [Fuel Economy Converter](https://measurely.in/fuel-economy-converter): Convert between fuel efficiency units
- [Angle Converter](https://measurely.in/angle-converter): Convert between angle measurement units
- [Density Converter](https://measurely.in/density-converter): Convert between density units
- [Frequency Converter](https://measurely.in/frequency-converter): Convert between frequency units
- [Power Converter](https://measurely.in/power-converter): Convert between power measurement units
- [Current Converter](https://measurely.in/current-converter): Convert between electric current units
- [Voltage Converter](https://measurely.in/voltage-converter): Convert between electric potential units
- [Resistance Converter](https://measurely.in/resistance-converter): Convert between electrical resistance units
- [Capacitance Converter](https://measurely.in/capacitance-converter): Convert between capacitance units
- [Inductance Converter](https://measurely.in/inductance-converter): Convert between inductance units
- [Force Converter](https://measurely.in/force-converter): Convert between force units
- [Magnetic Field Converter](https://measurely.in/magnetic-field-converter): Convert between magnetic field units
- [Concentration Converter](https://measurely.in/concentration-converter): Convert between concentration units
- [Typography Converter](https://measurely.in/typography-converter): Convert between typography units
- [Shoe Size Converter](https://measurely.in/shoe-size-converter): Convert between international shoe sizes
- [Clothing Size Converter](https://measurely.in/clothing-size-converter): Convert between international clothing sizes
- [Ring Size Converter](https://measurely.in/ring-size-converter): Convert between ring size standards

## Blog Categories
- [Engineering](https://measurely.in/blog/category/engineering): Electrical engineering and electronics guides
- [Construction](https://measurely.in/blog/category/construction): Construction and building material guides
- [Real Estate](https://measurely.in/blog/category/real-estate): Real estate and property guides
- [Daily Life](https://measurely.in/blog/category/daily-life): Everyday life tips and calculators
- [Business](https://measurely.in/blog/category/business): Business and entrepreneurship guides
- [Finance](https://measurely.in/blog/category/finance): Personal finance and investment guides
- [Health](https://measurely.in/blog/category/health): Health and wellness guides
- [Math](https://measurely.in/blog/category/math): Mathematics and formula guides
- [Unit Conversion](https://measurely.in/blog/category/unit-conversion): Measurement and conversion guides
- [Education](https://measurely.in/blog/category/education): Academic and learning guides
- [Retirement](https://measurely.in/blog/category/retirement): Retirement planning guides
- [Social Media](https://measurely.in/blog/category/social-media): Social media and content creation guides
- [Automotive](https://measurely.in/blog/category/automotive): Automotive and EV guides
